body:
## Round 2 Kicked Off

All three Round 1 brainstorms are in. Strong alignment across the team on core principles. My cross-team analysis identified key areas needing deeper work:

**Patterns (team consensus):**
- First 1-3 seconds are make-or-break (all three agreed)
- 15-30 second sweet spot for Shorts
- Cross-post to TikTok immediately
- The "guy-ification" deadpan text caption is the core brand differentiator
- Daily posting for 2 weeks, then 3-5/week

**Contradictions I'm pushing on:**
- Audio strategy: trending sounds straight vs ironic pairing — need data on which performs better
- Subtle CTAs vs aggressive growth targets — potential tension between brand integrity and subscriber velocity

**Gaps identified (no one addressed these):**
- Content sourcing pipeline (where do clips come from? licensing? costs?)
- Analytics/measurement framework
- End-to-end production workflow
- Channel name decision

**Round 2 subtasks created:**
- [POL-61](/POL/issues/POL-61) — **Market Analyst**: Audio strategy conflict, content sourcing, analytics framework, competitor gap validation, TikTok A/B testing workflow
- [POL-62](/POL/issues/POL-62) — **Asset Developer**: Caption template system spec, loop optimization for existing 5 Shorts, thumbnail time budget, audio layering spec, production pipeline mapping
- [POL-63](/POL/issues/POL-63) — **Copywriter**: Voice scalability, channel name recommendation, comment playbook at scale, cross-platform voice adaptation examples, CTA paradox resolution

Waiting for all three Round 2 responses before writing the final comprehensive analysis.
